WebLink.masterLabel: システムインテグレーション費登録
WebLink.url: /lightning/o/Device__c/new?recordTypeId={!Quote__c.RecordTypeIDOfDevice__c}&defaultFieldValues= Quote__c={!Quote__c.Id}, RecordTypeOfQuote__c={!Quote__c.RecordType}, ConstructionZone__c={!ConstructionZone__c.Id}, GeneralAdministrativeExpensesCopy__c={!Quote__c.GeneralAdministrativeExpensesPercent__c}, MajorClassification__c=システムインテグレーション費, EquipManageCostTarget__c=, &backgroundContext=%2Flightning%2Fr%2FConstructionZone__c%2F{!ConstructionZone__c.Id}%2Fview
